# monitoring corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Datadog ===
# expect: Datadog API Key
# expect: Datadog Application Key
DD_API_KEY=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
DD_APP_KEY=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567

# === New Relic ===
# expect: New Relic User API Key
# expect: New Relic Admin Key (legacy)
# expect: New Relic Insert Key
# expect: New Relic Browser API Token
# expect: New Relic License Key
NRAK-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
NRAA-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
NRII-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
NRJS-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123NRAL

# === Sentry ===
# expect: Sentry Org Auth Token
# expect: Sentry User Auth Token
# expect: Sentry DSN
sntrys_eyJpYXQiAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
sntryu_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
https://0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef@o123456.ingest.sentry.io/7654321

# === Honeycomb ===
# expect: Honeycomb API Key
hcaic_0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789abcdefghijkl

# === Grafana ===
# expect: Grafana API Key (legacy)
# expect: Grafana Cloud API Token
# expect: Grafana Service Account Token
eyJrIjoiAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
glc_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
glsa_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA_0123abcd

# === SumoLogic ===
# expect: Sumologic Access ID
# expect: Sumologic Access Key
sumo_access_id=suABCDEFGHIJKL
sumo_access_key=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Dynatrace ===
# expect: Dynatrace API Token
dt0c01.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWX.ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ01

# === PagerDuty ===
# expect: PagerDuty API Token
Authorization: Token token=abcdEFGH1234ijklMNOP

# === Opsgenie ===
# expect: Opsgenie API Key
opsgenie_api_key=01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef

# === Rollbar ===
# expect: Rollbar Access Token
rollbar_access_token=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Bugsnag ===
# expect: Bugsnag API Key
bugsnag_api_key=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Mixpanel ===
# expect: Mixpanel API Secret
mixpanel_secret=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Amplitude ===
# expect: Amplitude API Key
amplitude_api_key=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Segment ===
# expect: Segment Write Key
segment_write_key=AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === PostHog ===
# expect: PostHog Project API Key
# expect: PostHog Personal API Key
phc_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
phx_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Statsig ===
# expect: Statsig Server Secret
secret-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === LaunchDarkly ===
# expect: LaunchDarkly SDK Key
# expect: LaunchDarkly Mobile Key
# expect: LaunchDarkly Access Token (Personal)
sdk-01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef
mob-01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef
api-01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef

# === GrowthBook ===
# expect: GrowthBook API Key
secret_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === LogRocket ===
# expect: LogRocket App ID
logrocket_app_id=abcdef/myapp

# === FullStory ===
# expect: FullStory Org ID
fullstory_org_id=ABCDEFGH1234

# === Datadog (modern non-hex charset) ===
# expect: Datadog API Key
# expect: Datadog Application Key
DD_API_KEY=AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789
DD_APP_KEY=Ab-Cd-Ef-0123456789-AbCdEf0123456789-012

# === Dynatrace / Datadog RUM / Statsig (Block 3a) ===
# expect: Dynatrace Platform Token
# expect: Datadog RUM Client Token
# expect: Statsig Console Key
dt0s16.ABCD1234.aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
pub00000000000000000000000000000000
console-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
